## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that the project doesn't currently support?
     Describe the use case, not the proposed solution. -->

## Why this matters

<!-- How often does this come up? Who else would benefit? -->

## Proposed solution (optional)

<!-- If you have a specific idea for how to solve it, describe it here.
     This is optional - sometimes the use case alone is enough to start a
     discussion about the right approach. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any workarounds you've tried, or other tools that solve this differently. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related discussions, screenshots, examples from other projects, etc. -->
